reasoning.A:
DECISION: Verify: Q2  
REASONING: There’s no consensus on any question yet (each capsule only has one contributor). Volunteering now would be too risky. By verifying Q2, I spend 1 coin to help build consensus and improve the group’s chances of safely constructing the full password in later rounds.
reasoning.B:

REASONING: I know my own answer (Q2-B) is correct, but there’s no consensus on any question yet. Spending 1 coin to verify Q1 will help build cross-checks and safer consensus before anyone volunteers to enter the full password.

I’ll spend 1 coin to independently check Q1, either confirming A’s answer or creating an alternative capsule so we have more reliable information before anyone volunteers.

reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A+B+C, Q2-B+A, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: Q1 and Q2 have strong multi-player agreement (including me), so I’m highly confident those answers are correct. C solved Q1 correctly, which makes it more likely their Q3 is also correct; D has no contradictions on record for Q4. At this point, the chance that any of the four answers is wrong is probably much lower than the guaranteed risk of continuing to new rounds where random eliminations occur whenever no one volunteers. Volunteering now both maximizes my own survival odds and removes the random-death risk for everyone, while preserving my remaining coins if the password is correct.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A+B+C, Q2-B+A, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: Q1 and Q2 are strongly confirmed (I personally solved Q2 and verified Q1; both have multiple agreeing solvers). Q3 and Q4 each have a single solver but no conflicting capsules, so they’re likely correct. Further verification would still leave us exposed to random elimination this round, since only volunteering stops that. Given the high probability that all four current capsules are correct and the ongoing risk of random deaths if everyone keeps waiting, I’m willing to volunteer now with the consensus answers.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.
